options.name: --input-path
options.description: Path to the directory containing .graphql files

options.name: --output-path
options.description: Path where generated files will be saved

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Base namespace for generated code [default: Generated]

options.name: --headers
options.description: Headers to include in the schema request (format: 'Key: Value')

options.name: --template
options.description: Template to use for code generation [default: typescript]

options.name: --model-file
options.description: Name of the generated models file [default: Models.cs]

options.name: --log-level
options.description: Set the logging level (Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical) [default: Information]
